hooks.command: echo '=== NETrock Environment Check ===' && (dotnet --version 2>/dev/null && echo 'OK .NET SDK' || echo 'MISSING .NET SDK') && (cd src/frontend && pnpm --version 2>/dev/null && echo 'OK pnpm' || echo 'MISSING pnpm') && (dotnet tool list -g 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'dotnet-ef' && echo 'OK dotnet-ef tool' || echo 'MISSING dotnet-ef (run: dotnet tool restore)') && (docker info >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'OK Docker' || echo 'MISSING Docker not running') && echo '=== Ready ==='
